chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.43 of 2019 Muzaffar Ali Khan Versus Khan Zada & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA 1740/19 Dated: 23.04.2024 Mr. Sheharyar Ibrahim Soho for appellant. None for respondents. -.-.- Learned counsel for appellant submits that the parties have settled their dispute out of Court and thus he has been instructed not to press this appeal along with listed application. Order accordingly. Appeal stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
